title: Providence
description: A modpack that aims to reimagine Minecraft as a more modern RPG game
body:
![The Providence Logo written in the classic Minecraft font](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e81bb0f4b4fa9575c673900f85cb4fdc19c35edf_0.webp)

A modpack that aims to reimagine Minecraft as an RPG-Like game, with more bosses, dimensions and even a remade Ender Dragon fight!

----- Why you should download the modpack -----

The modpack offers an experience meant for those who want MORE from Minecraft, with better terrain generation and New Biomes that maintain the original style of Minecraft! Providence also adds new Dimensions and shaders to compliment the look of the game!

---- Unfortunate Bugs ----

A known bug i've unfortunately encountered comes with a mod called ''More Villagers'', the bug is present in the Advancements menu, where the ''More Villagers'' background is unfortunately untextured! I don't know why that happens, and i unfortunately have found no way to fix it!

---- Future Updates ----

The modpack will be updated in the future, with the addition of more mods that don't conflict with the ones that were already in it.

(Keep Inventory is Recommended)
